plugin.name: HukoDB_Paste
plugin.author: HukoDB
plugin.purpose: Posts selected text to hukodb.com pastebin
plugin.description:
Posts selected text from the output window to the HukoDB pastebin. A shareable link is copied to clipboard.
To use: highlight text and press Ctrl+P
Requires: LuaSocket, LuaSec, json (dkjson or json.lua)

muclient.script:
local RELAY_URL = "https://mm-gear-relay.mm-gear.workers.dev" local MUD_NAME = "MyMUD" local has_http, http = pcall(require, "socket.http") local has_ltn12, ltn12 = pcall(require, "ltn12") local has_json, json = pcall(require, "json") if not has_json then local ok, dkjson = pcall(require, "dkjson") if ok then json = dkjson end end
-- Try to load ssl.https so socket.http can handle HTTPS pcall(require, "ssl.https")
function OnPluginListChanged() end
function CopyScript(name, line, wildcs) local first_line, last_line = GetSelectionStartLine(), math.min(GetSelectionEndLine(), GetLinesInBufferCount()) local first_column, last_column = GetSelectionStartColumn(), GetSelectionEndColumn()
if first_line <= 0 then DoCommand("copy") return end
if not http or not ltn12 or not json then ColourNote("red", "", "HukoDB_Paste: Missing required Lua modules (socket.http, ltn12, json)") return end
local cpstr = "" for line = first_line, last_line do local line_info = GetLineInfo(line) local line_text = line_info.text or "" if line < last_line then if first_column > 1 then line_text = line_text:sub(first_column) end cpstr = cpstr .. line_text first_column = 1 if GetLineInfo(line, 3) then cpstr = cpstr .. "\r\n" end else if first_column <= last_column - 1 then cpstr = cpstr .. line_text:sub(first_column, last_column - 1) end end end
cpstr = cpstr:gsub("^\r\n", "")
PostText(cpstr) end
function PostText(text) if #text == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", "HukoDB_Paste: No text selected.") return end
local prefix = "[" .. MUD_NAME .. "]\r\n" local body = json.encode({ content = prefix .. text }) local resp = {} local ok, status = http.request({ url = RELAY_URL .. "/rest/v1/pastes", method = "POST", headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json", ["Content-Length"] = tostring(#body), ["Prefer"] = "return=representation" }, source = ltn12.source.string(body), sink = ltn12.sink.table(resp) })
if ok and status == 201 then local data = json.decode(table.concat(resp)) if data and type(data) == "table" and data[1] and data[1].id then local link = "https://hukodb.com/paste.html?id=" .. data[1].id SetClipboard(link) ColourNote("CornFlowerBlue", "", "*** Pasted " .. #text .. " chars to HukoDB") ColourTell("CornFlowerBlue", "", "*** ") Hyperlink(link, link, "[paste link]", "cornflowerblue", "", true) ColourTell("CornFlowerBlue", "", " has been copied to clipboard.") print("") else ColourNote("red", "", "HukoDB_Paste: Unexpected response from server.") end else local msg = (ok == nil and "HTTP request failed (check internet/LuaSec)") or "HTTP " .. tostring(status or "?") ColourNote("red", "", "HukoDB_Paste: Failed to post. " .. msg) end end
-- Set up Ctrl+P accelerator AcceleratorTo("Ctrl+P", "CallPlugin ('a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2', 'CopyScript', '')", sendto.script)
ColourNote("CornFlowerBlue", "", "*** HukoDB_Paste loaded. Select text and press Ctrl+P to post.")
